headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -18.8)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 64% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 136 quotes and 106 at strong intensity, meaning a large volume of people are venting hard today.
• Despite leading the day, a score of 36.1 sits in the lower half of its 165-day range of -1.1 to 168.7, so this is elevated but far from peak levels.
• Frustrations eased notably from yesterday's 60.3, while Optimism recovered from a deep low of -51.6, though both remain in negative or middling territory.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
